title: Sachsenhausen from Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Sachsenhausen from Berlin is a serious half-day to full-day memorial visit,** not a casual extra between two fun stops.
**Admission to the memorial and museums is free.** Audio guides cost EUR 3.50 per device, and Saturday public tours are low-cost but limited.
**Use Berlin ABC if you travel from central Berlin.** The official memorial route is S1 or RE/RB to Oranienburg, then bus 804/821 or about 20 minutes on foot.
**Give the site real time.** Plan about 4.5 to 6 hours door-to-door if you want transport, orientation, exhibitions and a respectful pace.
**Do not stack it with too many heavy sites.** If Sachsenhausen is your main history stop today, keep the rest of the day quiet and practical.
